description: Human-authored overrides for WCAG 2.2 AA conformance. These override automated axe-core results in the OpenACR YAML report. Each entry must include a reason explaining the decision.

overrides.reason: Atomic does not include audio-only or video-only media components.
Atomic does not include synchronized media components requiring captions.
Atomic does not include synchronized media components requiring audio descriptions.
Atomic does not include live audio content.
Atomic does not include prerecorded video content requiring audio descriptions.
Atomic does not include components that auto-play audio.
No Atomic component enforces time limits on user interaction.
Atomic does not include moving, blinking, scrolling, or auto-updating content that starts automatically and lasts more than five seconds.
Atomic does not include content that flashes more than three times per second.
Page titles are a host application concern, not a component library concern.
Multiple navigation ways are a host application concern, not a component library concern.
Atomic does not include functionality operated by device or user motion.
The lang attribute on the HTML element is a host application concern, not a component library concern.
Consistent navigation ordering is a host application concern; Atomic components do not control page-level navigation.
Consistent identification across pages is a host application concern; individual Atomic components use consistent internal naming.
Atomic does not include multi-step forms that require redundant data entry.
Atomic does not include authentication flows.
